scripts.test:euro13: npm run build:cases && cross-env ASSISTANT_BASE_URL=http://euro13/assistant HEADED=1 playwright test --headed
scripts.test:headed: npm run build:cases && cross-env ASSISTANT_BASE_URL=http://euro13/assistant HEADED=1 SLOW_MO=400 playwright test --headed
scripts.test:headed:smoke: npm run build:cases && cross-env ASSISTANT_BASE_URL=http://euro13/assistant HEADED=1 SLOW_MO=400 playwright test --headed -g "bouwmaterialen-wall-guided|verf-paint-house|elektriciteit-ampoules"
scripts.test:journeys: npm run build:cases && cross-env ASSISTANT_BASE_URL=http://euro13/assistant HEADED=1 SLOW_MO=300 playwright test tests/assistant-journeys.spec.js --headed
scripts.test:journeys:wall: npm run build:cases && cross-env ASSISTANT_BASE_URL=http://euro13/assistant HEADED=1 SLOW_MO=300 playwright test tests/assistant-journeys.spec.js --headed -g "bouwmaterialen-wall-guided"
